positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of cosmic flora, featuring luminous, bioluminescent flowers and abstract galactic swirls arranged in a balanced mandala pattern. The composition is centered and designed for a high-contrast textile print. Incorporate stylized crescent moons, nebula dust, and trailing comet elements among the flowers. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with deep-space ethereal vibes. Strong, clean outlines (line art style), deep midnight blue, indigo, and glowing gold color palette. Highly detailed digital illustration, clean silhouette, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, low resolution, grainy, noise, out of focus, amateur, messy, poorly rendered, cartoon, abstract junk
